name: Zaika - Food Delivery Platform 🚀
description: I developed an interactive UI with React Hooks, Redux, and reusable components for efficient state management and code reusability. Performance was optimized with bundlers, Babel, dynamic UI, and code splitting, while leveraging features like functional components, props & state, React Router, and React Testing Library to ensure scalability and testability.

name: ALGORITHM VISUALISER
description: I implemented 4+ pathfinding algorithms, including Dijkstra’s, A*, BFS, DFS, and Greedy Best-first Search, in a web app built with React using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript for a smooth user experience. I also integrated a Recursive Division Maze Generation algorithm, creating complex mazes and showcasing proficiency in algorithm design and complexity management.

name: Design Portfolio Website
description: Check out my design portfolio! Made with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, spiced up with GSAP animations for that extra flair. Dive into a mix of creativity and tech, explore cool projects, and enjoy a smooth, eye-catching experience that showcases my design passion!
